lesson: Files internal/leads/db/queries.sql.go and internal/leads/sql/queries.sql co-change with NPMI=1.000 but have no import relationship. This hidden coupling suggests a shared architectural concern — changes to one likely require changes to the other.

When unifying multiple agent constructors into a Runtime, preserve workspace-specific model configs to avoid behavioral regression
Always inject optional dependencies (embedding, qdrant) into the Runtime even if they were previously passed at agent construction time
uuid.Parse errors on optional fields should be skipped, not returned
Test fake schedulers need to implement all interface methods including new unified ones
